login.error: An error occurred while trying to login with Google
login.brandSubtitle: Gather the team, reveal votes together, and land on a number everyone buys into.
login.description: Sign in with your Google account to access your rooms.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to Skaptain's {terms}.

rooms.recentRoomsSubtitle: Pick up where you left off or start a new round.
rooms.emptyTitle: You don't have any rooms yet
rooms.emptyDescription: Create your first room and share the link with your team to start estimating.
rooms.roomFullMessage: This room has reached its limit of {max} participants. Ask someone to leave or create a new room.
rooms.deleteRoomMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this room?

pokerRoom.revealHintTeam: reveal when the team is ready
pokerRoom.backlogDone: The whole backlog is estimated. Nice work!

backlog.title: Backlog
backlog.emptyOwner: Add a topic below to start estimating.

history.title: Voting history
history.empty: No rounds recorded yet. Reveal the votes and apply an estimate to save it here.

jira.connectSubtitle: Only the room owner sets up the connection. Backlog tasks appear for the whole team.
jira.tokenHint: Generate it at id.atlassian.com › Security › API tokens
jira.secureNote: Your token is not saved on our servers: it stays only in your browser and is used only to fetch the tasks.
jira.ownerOnly: Only the room owner can connect.
jira.syncError: Couldn't fetch Jira tasks. Check the details and try again.
jira.applyError: Couldn't send the estimate to Jira.
jira.updateMessage: Update {fields} on issue {key} in Jira (based on {points} pts)? The vote is already saved to history.
jira.selectPrompt: Pick a project (and optionally a board) to pull in the backlog.
jira.credsError: Couldn't connect. Check the domain, email and token.
jira.noBoards: No agile boards in this project — we'll use the project's tasks.
jira.manualJqlHint: When filled, the JQL takes priority over the project/board.

votes.errorClearingVotesNoRoomId: Error clearing votes, no room ID provided
